evidence: Shipped apps/orchestrator/templates/nextjs-realtime 42 files. SSE transport stream and publish routes, hub.ts in-process pub-sub plus optional Redis fan-out, room-channel abstraction, presence, membership ACL in policy.ts gating every subscribe and publish against channel_members, persisted messages, rate limit, reconnect plus offline-queue client SDK and useChannel hook, working two-pane chat demo, NextAuth v5 credentials JWT, channel REST create list invite history. Registered as container stack realtime in schemas/project.py and migration 0021. TypeScript reviewed BUILD-CLEAN zero blockers. Commits fc06e3b and 28f1ee0 on main. Integration tail in commit body discovery routing, image build, manual prod migration 0021, web label sync, functional proof deferred to G004.

evidence: access members relation-based ACL in nextjs-entities engine. registry.ts AccessPolicy members plus MembershipConfig plus fail-closed parse to owner. engine.ts authorize members branch, membershipPredicate subquery, assertMember create check, read scoping listRecords and findScoped, expand admin-only. Functional proof deferred to G004.
